star_1.text: I purchased the premium version so that I could play without restarting from the beginning after losing. It worked until level 10. After that, there are infinite levels but no checkpoints. Every time I lose, I have to restart from the infinity level. So why did I pay for the premium version?

I really want to give more stars but unfortunately this game didn't let me.Literally EVERYthing requires premium version!!! I was playing so well but accidentally clicked menu button. BOOM! I have to give money to get back my 350 balls. I mean seriously!! You guys could've added an option that says: "are you sure you want to go to menu coz these balls will cost you money"

So you know checkpoints, right? The point in every game you can continue from when you fail? This game locks the ability to resume from them behind a microtransaction. What are the checkpoints even for if you need to pay to use what they're literally designed to do? Classic mobile game greed. Basic function needs to be paid for, because of course it would. So if you need to put the game down for a while, you're just out of luck. If you can only play in short bursts, you can only play level 1.

You know i've been scrolling through the reviews and it seems like this game is just a huge scam. If it crashed on your phone, BE GRATEFUL ABOUT IT! Forget lagging or ads. The problem here is PREMIUM! You waste 2 bucks just to save your progress and if you don't have money it's very frustrating. AND EVEN IF YOU WANT PREMIUM, too bad. If you spend money on premium then it still thinks you don't have it and the people who made this game have done nothing about it. Read the reviews, you'll see.

Game itself is good. Premium doesnt work. First off it charged me 1.99 twice. Firat time it said error try again. So i did it again, and got charged twice. And to top it off It still wont let me start on a level other than 1 which i though was the point of premium. And when i try to "get premium" for the third time it tells me i already own this item.

The game consists of one level and one mode and every time you run out of balls, it starts again at the beginning. The game tells you about checkpoints saved but that's a lie in the free version. You can be really good at it but eventually you'll restart from zero. There are other game modes but you can't even see what they are about. Played 2 minutes and uninstalled, don't bother downloading. The game is indeed MEDIOCRE.

Good game... behind a paywall, I will reinstall this game when it allows free players to play other game modes and doesn't bait players each time they play again by making them think that they're playing from a checkpoint but really it says only paying players can start from a checkpoint and sends you all the waay back to the start. I would be fine if co-op and versus were only for premium but I think that the other game modes should be free.

What have you done to this game?! I loved this game but now you have to have premium for everything except classic. I liked this because: 1. No in app purchases. 2. You had everything for free. 3. No ads. But now you greedy devs have changed everything, so you lost a player. You are now in the hole instead of having money in your pockets because of your own filthy greed. So I'm afraid you won't get a good review from me, you are really making this game more a torture then a time killer. 😣😬😤

Amazing game, really is fun and enjoyable, but I just found out when you pause your game or need to turn you phone off temporarily, the game saves you point and Mark's it on the map, when you go back on and play it from the checkpoint after taking a break or dealing with something for a second, makes you restart unless you buy premium, I think it's stupid because you have to play money to take a break, but where I am I cant be on my phone 24/7 to play some game that's non stop.

Game had great potential, until I tried to purchase the premium version 3 separate times, & never received it. And without premium, u can't start back at the check points. It makes u start back from the beginning, no matter how far you make it. It's very frustrastrating.

you have to pay to be able to continue from where you died, after you die. If you don't pay, you have to start from the very beginning. All over again. Do not waste your time with this. With Samsung VR, this game was free without restrictions, and amazing in vr. Without vr, it sucks, and there's this stupid restriction with a pay wall. Don't give such companies your money.

DO NOT DOWNLOAD!!!!!! Unless you want to pay for it, don't download. None of the other game modes are free except the original, but that's fine. But they barely make it so you can win and make it as difficult as possible so that you pay $2.00 for their game. They even won't give you the luxury of having save points so that when you lose, you have to start all over or buy the game for checkpoints. Might as well make the game $1.99. I'm deleting now.

Could be immensely satisfying. However, the only achievement that works is the one for giving them money, while the rest (along with google features in-app) have been broken for several years, across multiple phones.

Cannot recommend. This is one of those games that makes you work hard for something then immediately take it all away because of one tiny mistake and makes you frustrated which is just not fun. To add to that, you have to PAY MONEY to restart from checkpoints but if you restart from anywhere beyond the middle checkpoint then the game will be over in 20 minutes and you've literally wastes your money away. Don't bother.

The game to me feels rigged just to buy the premium version Edit: The game has not inproved, even after a year of my original post. Turns out the more i read the 1 star and critical posts, the more i realise how bad this is. 1. You have to pay to get the premium version. 2. You cannot start from your checkpoints, you have to get the premium. 3. Premium is a scam, the premium actually Doesn't do anything. It doesn't let you start from your checkpoints. All that happens is money deduction. 👎

If u don't get premium u just can't really play the game because you have to start from the beginning, and belive me if u get a checkpoint for example the 4th checkpoint you won't want to do all that over and over again , I recommend you guys to let us use the checkpoints on the free version as well. I instantly uninstalled the game after I realised that you can't use the checkpoints without the premium version. I don't recommend the game.

The game is really fun to play. But starting from checkpoints require premium purchase. What kind of nonsense is that. Come up with some other features for premium purchase. Why even bother making it a free download when all you can do free is playing the same distance every time?

It's a good game don't get me wrong, but in order to save your progress you have to pay real money. I don't wanna pay money to save my progress. On a game. You should add an on game currency that you get from hitting crystals and glass. Then you could pay the coins or whatever for checkpoints.

Edit : I am playing in android. There is a bug where you paused the game as you enter a door, paused the app and open another app (phone calls etc) and then coming back later the level is random. How do I get from save point 2 to infinity and then back to save point 11. However if you pause before entering the door, pause the app and then coming back the level will be on repeat (the balls too).

There is no explanation for some actions in the game. Also, the game is so easy that the only way for it to make the player lose is hitting him with objects that randomly bounce towards him. The only reason for playing is the relaxation coming from smashing glass, which is demolished by the anger of losing because of random objects coming from nowhere hitting you.

star_2.text: The game's content and work are very good.But the real problem is that if you lose a level, you only need the premium version of the game to start from that point in that level, and if you don't buy it, you have to start again. That's okay. It's boring to have to be in the same map with me every time.For that, maybe you should change the map of this game so that it comes out different every time or change it by buying the premium system.The only good thing about this game is that its graphics

It's been years since I wrote a review about this game. Back then? Fantastic! Now? Read the most recent reviews. You now need premium just to start at a checkpoint. If you don't see the big deal about that? The game is absolutely massive with progressive difficulty, you DON'T want to restart. every game needs to make money, Especially when it's free, we do get it devs. But this is greed at that rate. You got 100 million downloads and act like you're broke. Editted to 2 stars. For old times sake.

Fun game but you need to spend money to unlock most of the game and without it it's just the same thing over and over. On top of that I did buy all the extra stuff but then when I uninstalled it just forgot that I bought them so if I wanted to play those levels I would have had to have bought them again dont know if that is a problem at my part tho it could be.

The gameplay is unique and challenging and fun but this game feels like a demo as all the other game modes (PvP , co-op etc) are locked for free users. And you can't even use checkpoints without paying them( like SERIOUSLY?!) So once the game is over you have to start all over again if you are a free user. Apart from that this game definitely deserves a try from people looking for casual , relaxing yet challenging gameplay.

Really good concept but misdelivered execution, I think. I really understand that making a game is difficult and requires hours(+) to perfect, but thing such as variation in the direction of a ball throw not controlled by the player is unnecessarily frustrating, or other inconveniences like in multishot mode it is harder to hit targets as the balls spread so you have to shoot at another off angle and hope the balls go the way that you want; inconsistency and hitches ruin this game for me. :(

So basically this game is actually not free as I literally have to start all over if I fail no matter in which level I'm in, if I have passed like 4th level nd mayb I need to stop playing it for a bit so I stopped I literally can't play from 4th , I have to start all over again from level 1 , that's jst even more annoying, in short U must buy premium, that's jst the worst, why would I bother playing it then ...

This is a great game. Very unique. But it can be very frustrating in a way that pointlessly robs it of being a five-star game. For instance, why don't we have the option to continue from our last checkpoints after completely exiting the game? And why don't we have boosters like protective shields for when we get hit? And why don't we have the option to buy more balls to continue playing when we run out? I could go on and on and on.

I play the paid version. It's ok for what I was looking for. A time waster that's not addicting, no ads (paid version), and doesn't invade the privacy of your data. Took off stars because of the unavoidable objects in the game -or- you destroy an object and the debris hits you. They suck the life out of the enjoyment imo.

This game is fun for a little but but you need to buy premium to do everything in the game. You can't even use the checkpoints. I understand wanting 5o make money but there is little to no content in the game. If you willing to spend money this would be a pretty awesome offline game.

Playing the free version was fun, even if you had to return to Level 1 with each new game. I bought it, and wish I had not. Choices like Training/Classic always revert to Training. Balls that used to hit their targets now bounce off them. I can throw 3 balls at a sheet of glass, watch and hear it break, yet the game says the glass clobbered me! This game is going away, especially without hints to help the player. Waste of money.

It would be a good game of you didn't have to pay to start at checkpoints. Why is that a thing? Everything else is great, but getting through the levels takes so long and when you lose you lose your progress. And the game taunts you by saying "want to start at checkpoint?" And of you click yes it just throws "buy premium!" Ultimately taking too long to get back to checkpoints and not being able to start at checkpoints made me uninstall this game after not even a day off having it.

Really good game but they ruined it by needing premium to save checkpoints though. Like seriously who does that it's a checkpoint! You might as well have the game up for purchase at that point. instead of having us take the time to download the game and wasting storage spaces and time for a game that can't even be played. Unless you do it without the premium. Like a challenge to see how far you can go without deleting the game that is 🫥

When it comes to anything, its about time to $ ratio. I played this enough for the 2 dollars to matter, and im still not disappointed. Why would i not give 2 dollars to both support the game and to get the full benefits of it. To say a game this good is too expensive is bull... No ads. No paying for more lives. No waiting 5 days to build or upgrade, etc. Gtf off your high horses. Long story short, ive had it for over a year and i still love it. Update: Apparently I lost my purchase...

All the "achievements" and "checkpoint" pop-ups pop exactly at the "precise" moment when you need to press the top of your screen,making you lose you streak 9/10 times... This is frustrating , very frustrating. Played this game 2014-2015 a lot and never had this problem. I just don't believe that the exact moment for those "pop-ups" is not intentionally synchronized in order for the player to be unbable to hit his targets.

This game may have good graphics and soundtrack and the that's amazing for a mobile game. But this game is like every other game. You need to buy premium to restart from checkpoints and play different gamemodes. I've been trying to complete the classic mode but because I couldn't start from where I ran out of balls, this is rigged. Sure the premiums cheap but that still annoys me. Well atleast there are no ads. Overall 2.5 stars. Good soundtrack/artstyle but pay to win which sucks out all the

The so called best destruction physics on mobile devices? The developers of this game must know nothing about physics. The fact that the placement of every breakable object in the game is exactly the same every time you go through it, yet you can do the exact same shot in the same place yielding several different results shows poor gameplay design. Nice music, though.

I like this game but I'd really like it if I DIDNT need to pay from premium version. Cuz every time I run out of balls to keep going it pops up with "go premium" or "cancel" and hitting cancel the game literally rewinds and starts back at the very beginning. Fix this problem, please. I'm not the only one to comment this either.

The game has definitely gone downhill since I last played. The only thing that really changed were the paid checkpoints, but honestly it's the worst kind of change. It never used to be a pay-to-win kind of game. It's sad to see that's what it has become. I guess games either fade away into irrelevance, or survive long enough to inevitably turn into a pay-to-win.

Not a bad game i just wish that doing anything else than starting from checkpoint 1 didnt require premium. Examples: starting at any checkpoint you passed, playing other modes, seeing your score. Having those come free with the download would make the game alot better and get more downloads

I guess their is some bug because as soon as i open the game a counter pop in which is showing counting in millions and somehow im getting unlimited balls to hit and the counting sound is way too loud and annoying. i request the devs to please look into it. i already reinstalled it two times but same problem is occurring.

star_3.text: it is a fun game, and i like the difficulty a lot. however, it really bothers me that you give checkpoints but you can only use them if you purchase premium. also, the fact that you can only play on classic mode unless you purchase premium. maybe you could give an option to like watch an ad, and be able to use premium benefits for a certain amount of time, or ad some sort of in-game currency. i feel like that would make the game much more enjoyable

Pretty nostalgic to many people including me, the game is overall challenging and very satisfying. Unfortunately you only get the classic mode to play on and every other feature is basically something you have to pay for so if you die near the end then you have to start over again from the start.

It's a nice game. However, the fact that you need to spend money to buy premium and load checkpoints which you've already achieved is... annoying. At least just let free users watch an ad to load a checkpoint, with the rest of the game staying the same, and this'd be a much better reviews by me. This is really the only thing that bothers me about it, and premium could just remove the ad feature and give the extra game modes. Review end due to character limit.

I used to play this game 7 or 8 years ago it was fun. Now, I bought the premium version, but I ended up playing an infinite phase, which is just hard and frustrating with no checkpoints nor the motive to keep playing. I hope u add more levels for the premium players. Otherwise, what's the point of buying it? And a scoreboard will be more fun to have to compete with other players.

The single player game is great, but the versus or coop mode is infuriating. In the solo modes the point where you touch is where the ball is launched. In 2 player modes for some reason that is not the case, and the further you are from the centre line (of the player's perspective, screen-wise it is the quarter line) the worse it is. So the controls are not the same and it is very annoying (especially these low corner shots). If it helps, I use Galaxy S20FE.

Updated: New version requires paid in order to resume from check points : / Love the game! I wish I knew what the power ups did when I pick them up though. The off screen hits are also a bit sly in the later levels cause there's not much you can do against them at that point and they can come from the side. Difficult to tell if you're gonna get hit, I find it rather cheap.

It's a wonderful, immersive game with great soundtrack. Purchased the premium version but was disappointed when I realized there were only 11 levels.(Should've read the desc. better.) I was expecting a lot of unique levels with different soundtracks. I didn't really like the infinity level at the end because of the repetitive soundtrack. Premium is very cheap though, so maybe new levels could be added with an additional purchase. Also the aiming in multiplayer mode is really off.

The game is really fun, however there are many issues with it. First of all, I genuinely loathe how pressing anywhere on the pause menu will unpause the game. It's impossible to pause and look at something else. Secondly, and the reason I'm making this comment, is that there are many bugs since the last update. Crystals fall over and break on their own, balls shoot at inconsistent speeds (one ball doesn't reach the crystal whereas the next one shoots so fast it bounces back from the next wall to

One of the best. The graphics are beautiful and the level of challange is entertining. ive come back to this game again and again. my only issue is i would like to be able to transfer progress from one device to the next device. If you get a new phone, you will have to start over. You cannot transfer any saved progress.-2 Stars.

Honestly, I really enjoy playing this game. However, there should have been more checkpoints and some changes to some levels; noticable glitches are that one glass bar in Checkpoint 3 Zone 2 is glitched. It goes in between the pillars, some glass blocks and crystals break when they are being escalated by elevator platforms, Please fix those issues. Also, add more endless gamemode styles. Thank you.

This game is full of unnecessary difficulties and starts freaking me out! It's stupid that I must pay for the option to start from last checkpoint. I must to replay the whole game again, every time! There are a "zen mode", where you don't need to doubt about the amount of balls and and that these glass things will hit you (i guess)... But it's only for people who have money, of course... I remember I bought premium few years ago, but nothing changed and the money gone.

I've been playing the same 11 levels for years. Within a couple hours of paying for the pro version, I was already bored. You can easily beat all 11 levels then the "infinity" level becomes impossible pretty quickly. I really wish the developers would add a bunch of new levels, esp for those of us that paid! It's a shame bc this would be my favorite game. I've never played a game with so few levels. It's such a well made & fun game otherwise!

Great game, I recently revisited a classic that brings back fond memories from my childhood, and I must say, it delivers just as it did when it first launched. The graphics are still quality and even today. The gameplay feels nostalgic and authentic. However, one area that could use improvement is the access to different modes, like Zen and others. It’s a bit disappointing that one has to pay for it. However still a great game overall 🎮👏👍.

Love the game except the fact that there is a button that says "restore purchase" to restore when you buy the premium for Life thing that they have $1.99. I figured it was just my device at the time. But I have tried on multiple devices to restore my purchase and I still cannot click on that button. I would rather know that I would have to pay a $1.99 every time I installed the game than to be lied to about buying Premium "for life" not Cool! For that, I give 3 stars.

Growing up I loved playing this game but now I see how many buggs are in it and how many patches are needed. Like hitting a crystal and it not giving you the balls to breaking the glass and still getting hit. They're minor problems bit they happen offtten enough to be noticable. However, the game is great for children. This game practically built my childhood and with the never ending stream of levels each ranging in difficulty it never gets boring. Over all it's a good game.

The game is very fun and also quite addicting, but I don't like how just to buy different game modes and get check points you need to pay since I usually only play games that are free since I don't see the point of using most of your life savings on a game but anyways,, it's very fun and that's it

So glad I played this long before they took away literally every feature and put a pay wall in front of it. You used to be able to pick up where you left off, now, without premium (which is cheap) you are forced to start from the beginning every single time whether you get a checkpoint or not, kinda makes checkpoints pointless lmfao Not everyone has a credit card so it's sad you put a Paywall on such a good game but whatever, my review is pointless as are every review

It's an alright game. I appreciate that there is no ads but the fact that most of the game is unavailable unless you pay for premium and also that there is not many levels but the game is well paced and runs quite well for how much detail there is. Overall its a good game.

It's really good and nostalgic, I have been playing it for many many years, but you have to pay for premium to actually play at least 85% of the game, It's really annoying, it's cheap I think like $3 but I don't have money and I don't want to spend money on a mobile game, and it's sad too because it makes the game playable to spend money and this includes ads so they could make it free because they have plenty of ad revenue "probably I don't know if they actually do or don't"

The free version of an excellent game. But that's all this is: The free trial version. No saves, no stats, no leaderboards, nothing. While the game is fun, I don't like the fact that it tries to suck you in and than get you to pay for the rest of it. Honestly I would've even considered buying the game. However I feel like I was manipulated into buying it rather than making a conscious decision on my own. Be more straightforward and you won't lose customers.

star_4.text: In short, I like this game. The visuals are impressive, and the sound further contributes to the feel of the environment. I only have to say that it's the same level you play through every single time with no changes, which makes it very mundane to go through multiple times. All of the other game modes besides the classic mode also require payment to play. Otherwise, I find it enjoyable.

So far so good. Downloaded recently and I've been having a positive experience. It's quite relaxing, the glass breaking physics are great! It's not too difficult if you can hit the crystals, and there's no random pop up ads! One problem I do have with it is that it's WAY too easy to lose your multi-ball, if you miss ONE crystal it goes away. Another thing is that you need to watch ads to actually use the checkpoints, which is annoying. Overall really great tho, definitely recommend.

This is a must have. Nice graphics, satisfying sounds and breaking, and lots to do. There's just 2 problems: only 13 (very long) levels for the free mode, and all the other ones need to be payed. If there was a system that allowed you to get modes by doing something like leveling up that would be great. Other than that this game has plenty to offer

I love this game, but one thing I can't accept. In mayhem mode, there are bosses. This is fine. Later in the game, there are crystals before the boss. This is even better. However, in checkpoint 9, the crystals at the end come so fast, that if you did not save the purple time slow power-up, (the nearest one is at the end of checkpoint 6) you will almost certainly miss a few and lose your streak, which is especially irritating if you are trying to get a high score and a full streak is almost required in the last two zones. If they could at least give you time to react and put it a bit farther back, (like all the other ones) it would be fair.

first and foremost, NO ADS!!! I use to love this game a lot. I've played it for years. I had gotten through the 10 levels, giving me access to all the other cool features and difficulty options, which I really enjoyed. However, I just installed it on my newest phone and not only did I have to start over from the beginning, now in order to start at an achieved checkpoint, you have to pay bc now, that's a premium feature, which is bs. otherwise this is an excellent game

Really fun, addicting game. Awesome graphics and sound. Very surreal and futuristic. No ads! Only one complaint: for some reason, without even touching the screen, it'll start launching balls in rapid-fire, wildly and won't stop. Suddenly, I'm all out of balls! Game over! Very frustrating! If not for that glitch, I'd definitely give it 5 stars.

I think I love it..... until you finish every round then there's nothing left but "infinity" *sigh* PLEASE ADD MORE LEVELS!! EDIT: I took a break from the game for a while and came back to it. Not loving the addition of the ads :-( What was so special about this game before was NO ADS!! It was just relaxing fun. In a world filled with anxiety, this was the break from reality I enjoyed. Now it's like every other game with annoying ads.

It's fun, I can say, but the only bad part is the fact that you have to pay for premium to spawn at the checkpoint. Sure, it's only $1.99, and premium is also for things like different game-modes, but the game could let you respawn for free, and keep the game-modes costing money. That, I understand, but I feel the need for there to be free checkpoint-respawns.

Id definitely give it a play for a time waster. The soundtrack is worth putting earphones to chill too. Its quite a sensory game for me to relax to. Shiny shattery physics glass, taps of steel balls, the flow of the music and the long halls ahead of you. It's worth keeping around for killing time, and chillin time. Though it is pretty simple, not bad at all.

A relaxing game! The controls are great, the graphics are gorgeous, and the sound design is amazing, I loved playing this game back when i was a tad bit youger. I just have a liytle issue with the fact that if you loose you have to go all the way back to the beginning, there is no save point no nothing, it sucks! Other than that it's one of my favorite mobile games ever!

This game was fun! It took some practicing but overall I enjoyed it! The graphics were amazing but some of the code in the game didn't make much sense. Sometimes certain glass panels would hit you before you had the time to hit it beforehand. Again, this game was really fun. And btw there is no "ending" you just enter 'infinity mode' which makes you go on and on until you run out of balls

The sound engineering is a treat! A sharp, crunchy, meditative, treat! The music is awesome and the glass is satisfying to break. So it's a pity to report that the game is often too fast for its own good, and the pickup, powerup, throwing, and menu sounds all sorta stink by comparison. They're not bad! They're just not up to the rest of the game's audio.

I only wish you can unlock the rest of the game after finishing classic mode. The game is all about Patience,Timing,Rhythm,Practice,Fun,Strategy,etc. The soundtrack beyond by immersing the atmosphere of the game. Having to breathe after focusing on reaching the end of the level is something we need for Mobile Games. We had Smash Hit as a legendary game. So props to the people who worked on this game and made it possible.

i love this game. i've been playing it for years, But I've only. been playing one part. i think it's unfair to have to pay for the next levels, there's some people who might really enjoy this game but can't afford the next levels, or maybe their parents might not allow them, or might not buy them premium. the paying levels should be at least around the 5th level so players can enjoy it and get a good look into the game before thinking of buying. i hope you consider this ♡

My new favorite game. Love the graphics. Love the sound effects. Surprisingly great stress reliever, especially in zen mode. Nice job on this one. So far no complaints. 9.13.19 would love to be able to choose power ups instead of using the last one I pick up. Have hit a few by mistake aiming for a crystal. But overall great stress reducing game. Worth the buy.

Ok. This game is really good graphics wise for a mobile game and I'm not saying the game play is bad. I enjoyed playing this. However, the game shows no mercy when it comes to checkpoints. The game has checkpoints. It even says you made it to one. But if you don't have premium, you're going to have to start the whole game over again and it's one long game. Other then that, this game is good. No ads, at all. Premium is cheap. No monthly pay. Good game. 4/5!

The graphics, the sound effects, the background music, the concept, they are all great as I played the game but I really wanted to play in different ways however I can only access the other modes through paying. The game creators deserve that though, with the great quality of their game. I just think that at least one free different mode would've been better or at least a trial period in those modes would also be better.

Wow! I remember really wanting to play this game over and over again. And since then, Smash Hit is actually the smash hit of moblie gaming. The graphics are top notch, this is one of the most polished game I've even seen. But this game is hard, to me this all starts at Checkpoint 3. The only reason I put 4 stars is that you have to buy Premium to continue the levels you left off with. And I think Checkpoint Endless needed that, it is so rapidly impossible. (The level was probably for the fans).

I've loved this game since 2018. However, I think it would be great to add more checkpoints for players. I purchased the premium version because I wanted to support the game and its developers. While I don’t want a refund (it was affordable), I would appreciate more checkpoints or similar enhancements. Still, I really enjoy the game!

A classic and fun game. Idk what to say but yeah, it's a fun game if you wanna waste time. Althought I'm gonna have to bring down a star because apparently, you need to buy premium just to use checkpoints and check your status, which makes the game boring because you get close to the end but you fail and you have to start all the way over. Overall this game is great and I would recommend.

star_5.text: One of the few games on the marketplace that remains true to itself, and even more appealing: uncluttered with ads and other unwanted commercial shoehorning. I have had this game for years now, and even in 2026, it remains a must-have time killer on any device. It's exactly as it says on the tin: An autoscroller where you smash glass blocks and crystals using heavy metal balls, all to a tranquil, immersive soundtrack (best experienced with a good pair of headphones). Please, get this game!

REALLY GREAT GAME!!! I have seen NO ADS! This game is offline, which makes it a really good time killer! The graphics are really good, the "credits" and "more games" levels i want to play a lot, and really nice features! The only thing that is wrong with this is that i have to get premium to continue at checkpoints and to use modes other that classic. Otherwise, like I said, REALLY GREAT GAME!!!

I played this game years ago somewhere around 2015 I believe and it is still by far one of the best mobile games to kill time with! I'm so glad it's still here! Some levels are pretty easy once you get the hang of aiming both crystals and glass. the only level I had a hard time getting through is the one that tossed cubes at you. Overall the game is intense and enjoyable at the same time ✨

10 years of playing this game and it's still just as good as ever. Amazing visuals, great physics, premium is worth the price (and cheap), banger OST, and just overall a really fun time killer. The physics are a little TOO good; sometimes the smallest thing will count as a hit and make you lose your streak (which can get frustrating), but that just adds a level of planning in advance that ramps up the difficulty nicely. 10/10 game that never gets old!

Love this game. Very generous monetization model where you can play the main game without adds for free but the paid version gives you more modes/endless (I think?) And checkpoints. I have many fond memories of playing two player with my siblings and the game itself! Visuals? Surreal. Mechanics? Love it. Can't recommend it enough. Just try it already! You'll be doing yourself a favor

I've played this game for years on end at this rate, I keep coming back and it's still enjoyable. It's spacey, trippy, and Douglas Holmquist's soundtrack enhances the experience tenfold. It's challenging enough to make it a proper game, while the zen mode is my personal favorite since I can just zone out to the music and scenes. It's visually incredible, and music and sound design is peak. I'll sing praises for Smash Hit forever probably.

I have loved/enjoyed this game for years and have installed it on several different devices over time. NO ADS! Some levels can be somewhat challenging but not impossible to pass. Great sound effects and graphics. Again...NO ADS! Couldn't ask for any more from an awesome game, which by the way is FREE to download! Give it a try...you surely will enjoy it too ☺️

Mobile games are cancer nowadays. They're riddled with ads and "optional" in-app purchases to try to milk all the money they can out of you. Then there's smash hit. I was prepared for the same experience and was very happily surprised. No ads in the free version hardens back to a better age of mobile games, and for $2 the premium is a fantastic bang for your buck. This is the most fun I've had with a mobile game since plants vs zombies.

Awesome game! Free, NO ads! I enjoy it so much that I had to upgrade! The premium version of smash hit is the first and only online purchase I've ever made! And totally worth it! There isn't another game like it at all! At least I haven't found one! I am very curious about the developers other games, and hope to get the opportunity to try them eventually! Seems they need tweeked to be accessible with newest version of Android! Also having trouble restoring my purchase this time! Advice please!?

Best game ever.. The House music is really cool while you play. Graphics are smooth and fluid. Sound effects are easy on the ears and not annoying like on some games, and guess what? You can actually play the game without being bombarded with a lot of ADS! Depending on the player, this game can be very addicting.. I love it. The music is actually very soothing and keeps you in a groove while you play.

I don't usually download games to my phone because the games are kinda cheesy with too many advertisements. However, this game is great!! Very challenging, fast-past, futuristic! You have to be on your toes to get from level to level, each one more challenging than the one before. If you fail, you go straight to the lobby and jump right back in with NO ADVERTISMENT! I paid the $1.99 to get the premium version but its well worth it. I recommend this game to everyone!

I first began playing Smash Hit in the 7th grade, which was almost 5 years ago at this point. Ever since, I've reinstalled it on all my touchscreen devices. I've love this game. It's ad free, has high quality/resolution, and such a fun way to pass the time by when you're bored. The levels aren't too easy, but not too hard either which is one of the key factors, for me that makes Smash Hit so much fun to play. If you're looking for a semi-challenging game to kill time, this game's probs for you!

Update: 2024 - Its been 9 years! I still come back. Best chillout or challenge game after all this time! *** I figured I'd give this game a shot. Holy carp! This is awesome! The music is great, and the game progresses nicely adding slight difficulty with each level. It's also not simply a high score type of game. It has a levelled structure, so you can progress through the game. All I have is the free version but I'll pay for this!

It's a GREAT casual game. The premium version only costs five dollars, which is so cheap that you have almost no reason not to, it has (as far as I'm aware) no bugs or glitches, other than some visual effects if you shoot too many balls in zen mode, and I've enjoyed this game since I was really young. Like, 4 or 5 years old. My aunt Lynn would let me play it on her phone while we were waiting for dinner to be ready during family reunions, and it was (and still is) the best way to pass the time.

I love this game!! Everyone seems to have all of these problems with the game but I haven't really experienced any. But I do have one problem, for some reason, the boss that is in mayhem doesn't do any damage to me. But other than that minor tweak this game is great, no ads, sounding and looking sleek, and just a super fun, and a bit difficult, a perfect mobile game!

I fell in love at the first break. I can't pay anything, so I only have the (one) classic course. It should come with new courses each mo., like holliday and seasonal themes. Hope the game is a big success. It's boring only having one course, and you don't really win anything or save anyone. It didn't hit me with a bunch of adds, and it's offline. Gotta like that. If it was my game, I'd be working on a battle option so people can throw balls at each other's glass, crystal, and China.

Mediocre has made two of THE BEST games to ever be on Android - Smash Hit and Pin Out. No ads. Gorgeous graphics. Great soundtrack. Hard enough to keep you coming back to try again but not so hard you never want to play again. I've played both games for years and will never delete them. You can't go wrong. I wish the devs would put out more games of this caliber.

Somehow relaxing and stressful at the same time, and that makes it even easier to get lost in it. This is a game that actually makes buying things in it a lot more tempting than most; and playing it for free is a great challenge. The lack of ads makes it a lot more relaxing, because when you lose it almost feels like it is trying to say, "look how far you got, next time you could get even further", if it had ads that whole thing would be messed up.

I remember playing this game years ago. Then and now, it's a very relaxing and high quality game. Graphics are amazing, game play is interesting, sounds are nice, and overall a very nice game. I love how dimensional this game is, you shoot a ball and it has momentum and keeps acting like you actually fired it off. There's nothing bad to say about it. Even the price for premium is reasonable and cheap. And, no ads!!!

This game is one of the more honest titles in the app store. When you look at the charts now, you can see half baked games that were created within the day, making classics like these lower on the board. This game is challenging, naturally, and has a lot more polish than most games out there now. I've seen 1 stars for this game, but the only reason that I see is because of the premium option to continue the game after you close it. It strays away from tons of ads, so that's why. Overall, 5+.
